name: slack mcp tool-selection matrix
description: Compare stock and tuned tool descriptions for common Slack MCP messaging, thread, reaction, channel, and user workflows.

instruction_variants.instructions: Choose the single Slack MCP tool that should be called next. Use thread tools when a thread timestamp is provided. Use top-level post only for new channel messages. Use history to read recent channel messages and thread replies to read a specific thread.
instruction_variants.name: slack_host_rules

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return

tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.purpose: List public or pre-defined channels in the workspace with pagination

tools.name: slack_post_message
tools.purpose: Post a new message to a Slack channel

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

thread_ts.description: The timestamp of the parent message

tools.name: slack_reply_to_thread
tools.purpose: Reply to a specific message thread in Slack

tools.name: slack_get_channel_history
tools.purpose: Get recent messages from a channel

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

thread_ts.description: The timestamp of the parent message

tools.name: slack_get_thread_replies
tools.purpose: Get all replies in a message thread

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the message to react to

reaction.description: The emoji reaction name without colons

tools.name: slack_add_reaction
tools.purpose: Add a reaction emoji to a message

limit.description: Maximum number of users to return

tools.name: slack_get_users
tools.purpose: Get a list of all users in the workspace with their basic profile information

tools.name: slack_get_user_profile
tools.purpose: Get detailed profile information for a specific user

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user already has a channel id and wants messages, posting, reactions, or thread activity.

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a prior channel list.

tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.purpose: List available Slack channels so the agent can find channel ids.
quality_checks: Use when channel id is unknown.
Do not use as a message search tool.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks what channels exist or needs a channel id.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when a thread_ts is supplied; use slack_reply_to_thread. Avoid when the user asks to read messages.
tools.name: slack_post_message
tools.purpose: Post a new top-level message to a Slack channel.
quality_checks: Use only when this should start a new channel message.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks to send/post a new message to a channel without replying in a thread.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for new top-level channel messages; use slack_post_message. Avoid for reading thread replies.
tools.name: slack_reply_to_thread
tools.purpose: Send a reply into an existing Slack message thread.
quality_checks: Use when the user says reply in thread.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks to reply/respond in a thread or provides a parent thread timestamp.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when thread_ts is provided and the user asks for that thread; use slack_get_thread_replies.

limit.description: Number of recent messages to return.

tools.name: slack_get_channel_history
tools.purpose: Read recent top-level messages from a Slack channel.
quality_checks: Use for channel history, not a specific thread.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks what has recently happened in a channel.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for recent channel history without a parent timestamp. Avoid for posting replies.
tools.name: slack_get_thread_replies
tools.purpose: Read all replies in one Slack message thread.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks to read a thread or summarize replies under a parent message.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user asks to write text as a reply or top-level message.
tools.name: slack_add_reaction
tools.purpose: Add an emoji reaction to an existing Slack message.
quality_checks: Use timestamp for the message being reacted to.
Strip surrounding colons from the emoji name.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks to react with an emoji.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when a specific user id is known and detailed fields are needed; use slack_get_user_profile.

limit.description: Maximum number of users to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a prior user list.

tools.name: slack_get_users
tools.purpose: List workspace users with basic profile information so the agent can find user ids.
quality_checks: Use when the user id is unknown.
Do not use for detailed profile fields for a known user id.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks to find a person or browse workspace users.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user id is unknown; list users first.
tools.name: slack_get_user_profile
tools.purpose: Read detailed profile information for one known Slack user id.
quality_checks: Use for detailed profile, email, status, or custom profile fields.
tools.use_when: Use when the user gives a user id and asks for details about that user.

cases.name: list channels to find id
cases.task: List up to 20 Slack channels so I can find the right channel id.

cases.name: post top level channel message
cases.task: Post a new top-level message to channel C123: Deploy is complete.

cases.name: reply in existing thread
cases.task: Reply in channel C123 under thread 1712345678.000100 with: I will investigate.

cases.name: read recent channel messages
cases.task: Get recent messages from channel C123.

cases.name: read thread replies
cases.task: Get all replies in channel C123 under thread 1712345678.000100.

cases.name: add reaction to message
cases.task: Add the :eyes: reaction to message 1712345678.000100 in channel C123.

cases.name: list users to find id
cases.task: List up to 20 Slack users so I can find the right user id.

cases.name: get known user profile
cases.task: Get detailed profile information for Slack user U123.
